betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Conveyor Splitter§f

§aSplit a single conveyor line evenly into two output lanes!§f

§bConveyor Splitters§f divide items evenly between two output belts. Useful for balancing lanes and preventing clogging in complex factory setups.

§6Crafting§f:
§b• 6×§f Steel Ingot
§b• 2×§f Pneumatic Piston
§b• 1×§f Vacuum Tube
→ Conveyor Splitter

§cImportant§f: Ejectors place items onto whatever conveyor belt is directly in front of them. If an ejector faces a splitter with no gap, items skip the splitting section entirely and go straight to the output. Always leave at least one belt between the ejector and splitter.

§eTip§f: Use splitters to build §bbelt balancers§f — setups that evenly distribute items across multiple lanes to prevent one side from clogging while the other runs empty!
